text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega completes her training routine
quicker than usual today.
choice_data_list: Want to run a little more?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't want to be seen like this... Not by anyone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm heading back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega usually runs until the stars come
out, so it's strange for her to cut her training
short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be feeling worn out. I should probably
adjust her race schedule.
